Mr. Schauer stated that he is hoping to have a petition for final distribution filed shortly, that they are waiting for the inventory and appraisal from the probate referee, and requested 60 days. Status on close of estate is continued to July 15, 2024 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. Mr. Schauer is informed that either a petition for final distribution, or a petition for approval of report on status of administration needs to be filed by then.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: Singh. Not reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Mar-18-2024 Continued To Apr-22-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Matthew Schauer appeared by zoom for Holger Siewart (administrator).

Mr. Schauer apologized to the court stating that failure to file the inventory and appraisal was an oversight on his part and that a report was not filed because he was dealing with the death of a relative. Status on close of estate is continued to April 22, 2024 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Not reported.

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION WITH WILL ANNEXED, Appointment Under IAEA
Off Calendar Feb-27-2023 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

This matter was put on for hearing with no appearance required for the purpose of admitting the will. No one appeared to object. There being no objections, the Court granted the Petition for Letters of Administration with Will Annexed. The will dated April 12, 2016 is admitted to probate. Holger Siegwart is appointed as the Administrator of the estate with will annexed with full authority. Bond is set at $1,600,000.00. Order for the same signed in open Court. Status on close of estate is set for March 18, 24, 2024 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. Karen Ann Simons is appointed probate referee.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: Choi. Not reported.

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION WITH WILL ANNEXED, Appointment Under IAEA
Off Calendar Jan-30-2023 Continued To Feb-27-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION WITH WILL ANNEXED, Appointment Under IAEA
Off Calendar Jan-04-2023 Continued To Jan-30-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Sep-27-2022 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Matthew Schauer, via Zoom, for Anne Fabbri, Petitioner.

The court affirms that there is no dispute that the petitioner is unqualified to serve as Executor as she is not a resident of the U.S.A. Counsel offers an update regarding the status of the matter and advises that a petition to appoint an alternate person as Administrator is ready to file but there is a delay in confirming the estate of a beneficiary who recently died in Germany. The court advises that it is inclined to take this petition off calendar and counsel can file the previously stated petition when it is ready.

The Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary is taken off calendar.

Judge: Hon. Cecilia Castellanos. Examiner: Sandra Hilton. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Choi. Not Reported.

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Aug-12-2022 Continued To Sep-27-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Jul-05-2022 Continued To Aug-16-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Matthew Schauer, via Zoom, for Anne Fabri, Petitioner.

The court and counsel discuss the bond waivers. Mr. Schauer advises that there has been an issue obtaining a bond as his client does not have a social security number and accordingly the bonding company will not issue a bond. The court advises counsel that the court will not waive bond for a Petitioner who is not a citizen of the U.S. The court also advises that there is no waiver on file from Donna.

After additional discussion, the matter is continued to Aug-16-2022 at 9:00 am in Dept. 204.

Judge: Hon. Joseph Quinn. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Prado. Not Reported.
